creator: lippe@freebsdbrasil.com.br
text:
I found same websites broken in http://www.freebsd.org/commercial/hardware.html,they are:

Status: [BROKEN]
Reference: FreeBSD Systems
URL: http://www.freebsdsystems.com/

Status: [BROKEN]
Reference: Neturn Corp.
URL: http://neturn.sinacity.com/netserv/

Status: [DOESN'T EXISTS MORE]
Reference: Tegatai Systems
URL: http://www.tegatai.com/

Status: [DOESN'T EXISTS MORE]
Reference: Ten 26
URL: http://www.ten26.com/

Thanks! :)

Fix: 

Remove these websites of this page.
How-To-Repeat: lippe@shire~>: lynx http://www.freebsdsystems.com/
lippe@shire~>: lynx http://neturn.sinacity.com/netserv/
lippe@shire~>: lynx http://www.tegatai.com/
lippe@shire~>: lynx http://www.ten26.com/
